changelog: The Complete ticket action now selects a real completed status instead of cancel/reject terminal statuses, including Czech status names with accents
Closed tickets are visible inline in All, Done, archived, and explicit closed-status views instead of disappearing into a hidden closed bucket
Explicit status filters no longer conflict with Open/Done work views
Show all and clear-filter links now keep users in the expected ticket view
Authenticated fallback redirects now use the Work home instead of the old Dashboard route
